---
title: "RAS Meta-transcriptmics with Beta Regression"
author: Michael Dondrup
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
params:
   rmd: "de_analysis_betareg.Rmd"
output:
  html_document:
  highlight: tango
  number_sections: no
  theme: default
  toc: yes
  toc_depth: 3
  toc_float:
    collapsed: no
    smooth_scroll: yes
---

This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code. 

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Cmd+Shift+Enter*. 

```{r echo=TRUE, warning=FALSE}
library(betareg)
library(rtracklayer)
library(kableExtra)
library(BiocParallel)
library(readxl)
```


```{r}
cat("Starting DE analysis with Beta Regression\n", file=stderr())
if (!exists('snakemake'))
  load('de_analysis.restart.rda', envir = parent.frame(), verbose = FALSE)
min.counts <- snakemake@params[["min_counts"]]
min.samples <- snakemake@params[["min_samples"]]
nthreads <- snakemake@threads
meta.data.path <- snakemake@input[["meta_data"]]
feature.count.path <- snakemake@input[["counts"]]
gff.rda.path <- snakemake@input[["gff_rda"]]
GOI <- c("") # Genes Of Interest
save(snakemake, file='de_analysis.restart.rda')
raw.counts <- read.delim(file=feature.count.path, comment.char = "#")
raw.mat <- as.matrix(raw.counts[-1:-6],rownames.force = T)
row.names(raw.mat) <- raw.counts$Geneid
dim(raw.mat)
summary(raw.mat)
zero.pct <- 100*sum(raw.mat == 0)/prod(dim(raw.mat))

cat(paste(zero.pct, "% zero unfiltered: \n"), file=stderr())
zero.pct
sum(rowSums(raw.mat) < 1)
sum(colSums(raw.mat) <1 )
raw.mat <- raw.mat[rowSums(raw.mat) >= min.counts, ]
raw.mat <- raw.mat[rowSums(raw.mat >= min.counts) >= min.samples, ] # at least two samples
dim(raw.mat)
zero.pct <- 100*sum(raw.mat == 0)/prod(dim(raw.mat))
cat(paste(zero.pct, "% zero in filtered raw counts: \n"), file=stderr())
zero.pct
# fix colnames
colnames(raw.mat) <- gsub("aligned.|.aln.sorted.bam", "", colnames(raw.mat))

#View(raw.mat)
```
Read the annotation data from a GFF file and check for presence of POIs
```{r}
cat("Loading reference annotation from RDA file", gff.rda.path, "\n", file=stderr())
load(gff.rda.path)

# restrict annotation search to type CDS
```



Read and process sampling sheet
```{r}
cat("Reading metadata from", meta.data.path, "\n", file=stderr())
meta.data <- read_excel(meta.data.path, n_max = 37)
col.data <- as.data.frame(meta.data)
colnames(col.data) <- make.names(colnames(meta.data)) # fix colnames so they can be used in formula

col.data$Sampling.date <- as.factor(col.data$Sampling.date)
col.data$Sampling.Time <- as.factor(col.data$Sampling.Time)


col.data[,"Treatment"] <- as.factor(col.data$Treatment..targeted.alkalinity.)
raw.mat <- raw.mat[,col.data$Sample.ID] # reorder data columns in the order of rows in the sample sheet
cat("Column names of metadata:\n", file=stderr())
cat(names(col.data), sep="\n", file=stderr())

```

Run DE analysis with Beta Regression
using design = ~ Sampling.Time,
```{r}
cat("Calculating relative abundances and preparing data for Beta Regression\n", file=stderr())
# calculate relative abundances
rel.abund <- t(t(raw.mat)/colSums(raw.mat))
rel.abund <- rel.abund[rowSums(rel.abund) > 0,]
# Smithson-Verkuilen transformation to map values into open interval (0, 1)
# Smithson, M. & Verkuilen, 
# J. A better lemon squeezer? Maximum-likelihood regression with beta-distributed dependent variables.
# Psychol. Methods 11, 54–71 (2006). DOI: 10.1037/1082-989X.11.1.54

n.samp <- ncol(rel.abund)
rel.abund <- (rel.abund * (n.samp - 1) + 0.5) / n.samp

cat("Prepared data for Beta Regression. Starting model fitting...\n", file=stderr())
cat("Using", nthreads, "threads\n", file=stderr())

# Step 1: Fast pre-screen with Kruskal-Wallis to identify candidate genes
cat("Pre-screening genes with Kruskal-Wallis test...\n", file=stderr())
# Use BiocParallel to speed up the pre-screening step, 
# setting tasks to 96 to avoid overwhelming the cluster with too many small jobs
bp.param <- MulticoreParam(workers = nthreads, tasks=96)
if (any(snakemake@params[["kruskal_walis_pre_screen"]])) {
  cat("Kruskal-Wallis pre-screening enabled. Running tests...\n", file=stderr())
  kw.pvals <- bplapply(seq_len(nrow(rel.abund)), function(i) {
    tryCatch({
      kruskal.test(as.numeric(rel.abund[i, ]) ~ col.data$Sampling.Time)$p.value
    }, error = function(e) 1.0)
  }, BPPARAM = bp.param)
  kw.pvals <- unlist(kw.pvals)
  # keep genes with KW p-value < 0.2 (liberal screen to avoid false negatives)
  kw.candidates <- which(kw.pvals < 0.2)
  cat("Pre-screen:", length(kw.candidates), "of", nrow(rel.abund),
      "genes pass Kruskal-Wallis filter (p < 0.2)\n", file=stderr())

  # Step 2: Run betareg only on candidate genes
  rel.abund.cand <- rel.abund[kw.candidates, , drop = FALSE]

} else {
  cat("Kruskal-Wallis pre-screening disabled. Skipping to Beta Regression on all genes.\n", file=stderr())
  rel.abund.cand <- rel.abund
} 

betareg.results <- bplapply(seq_len(nrow(rel.abund.cand)), function(i) {
  gene.name <- rownames(rel.abund.cand)[i]
  gene.data <- data.frame(rel_abund = as.numeric(rel.abund.cand[i, ]), col.data)
  tryCatch({
    model <- betareg::betareg(rel_abund ~ Sampling.Time, data = gene.data)
    coefs <- as.data.frame(summary(model)$coefficients$mean)
    coefs$GeneID <- gene.name
    coefs$term <- rownames(coefs)
    coefs
  }, error = function(e) NULL)
}, BPPARAM = bp.param)
betareg.results <- do.call(rbind, betareg.results)
# remove intercept rows, keep only Sampling.Time contrasts
betareg.results <- betareg.results[betareg.results$term != "(Intercept)", ]
betareg.results$adj.p.value <- p.adjust(betareg.results$`Pr(>|z|)`, method = "fdr")
betareg.results <- betareg.results[order(betareg.results$`Pr(>|z|)`), ]
cat("Beta regression complete:", nrow(betareg.results), "results\n", file=stderr())
cat("Significant results (adj p < 0.05):", sum(betareg.results$adj.p.value < 0.05), "\n", file=stderr())
cat("Top results:\n", file=stderr())
print(head(betareg.results), file=stderr())
save(betareg.results, file='results/betareg_results.rda')

head(betareg.results)

```
